content: I'm so excited about our wedding planning! We finally picked a date for next June.
That's wonderful news! Congratulations! When specifically in June are you thinking?
June 15th. It's exactly one year from when we got engaged. I thought that would be a nice touch.
That's very romantic! Where are you planning to have the wedding?
We're thinking of having it at my parents' house in the countryside. They have this beautiful garden that would be perfect for a summer wedding.
That sounds absolutely lovely! How's your fiancé feeling about that location?
He loves the idea. His name's Daniel, by the way. He's a software engineer too, actually. We met at work.
That's great that you both work in similar fields! How long have you been together?
We've been dating for about 3 years now. We started as colleagues at our fintech startup, and things just developed from there.
That's a nice story! Are your parents excited about hosting the wedding?
They're thrilled! My mom's already talking about the menu and decorations. She's been wanting to redo the garden anyway, so this is perfect timing.
It sounds like a wonderful family project. Have you started thinking about the guest list yet?
We have a rough draft. We're thinking about 100 guests. Most of them will be from Daniel's side since my family is smaller - just my parents and my sister Clara.
That's a good size. What does your sister think about being part of the wedding?
Clara's really excited. She's going to be my maid of honor. She's 5 years younger than me and just graduated from college last year.
